title: Prompts are code, .json/.md files are state
excerpt:
Prompts are code, .json/.md files are state
2025-06-02
Table of contents
Like most of you, I've been dabbling in what people call "agentic engineering." Truth is, there's not much engineering happening. We're basically throwing shit at the wall and hoping something sticks.
Using LLM coding tools like Claude Code to spin up throwaway greenfield projects or bang out ad hoc scripts? Pretty great experience. But try using them on a big, established codebase, or the-production-app-formerly-known-as-g
